tasks.title: fix: resolve validation suite failure after PR #1191
tasks.description: CI run 23715637824 failed on main. Job 'Validation' failed at step 'Run validation suite'. PR #1191 ('fix: restrict governance credential broker to internal users') broke the validation suite. Check what validation was added/changed and fix the test or implementation. CI URL: https://github.com/mutx-dev/mutx-dev/actions/runs/23715637824
tasks.reviewNotes: Code review: APPROVE. Test fix (getRefreshToken.mockReturnValue) is correct and targeted. PR already merged. Validation suite was ultimately unblocked by PR #1215 fixing the desktop/main.cjs lint error.

tasks.title: fix: resolve docker-compose validation failure after PR #1200

tasks.reviewNotes: CHANGES REQUESTED. The GRAFANA_ADMIN_PASSWORD env var fix in infrastructure-ci.yml is correct and resolves the Docker Compose validation. However PR #1213 was closed without being merged. The validation suite is still failing due to a separate lint error in desktop/main.cjs (fixed by PR #1215). Need to reopen/rebase this PR against current main to verify it passes full CI.
